Privacy Policy for Refloow Geo Forensics

Refloow Geo Forensics is a locally hosted desktop application. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting it.

Data Collection and Use This application does not collect, store, transmit, or share any personal information, telemetry, user data, or files. All file processing are performed entirely locally on your device.

Third-Party Access Because no data is collected, no data is shared with or sold to any third parties.

Transparency and Open Source We believe in complete transparency. Refloow Geo Forensics is open-source, meaning anyone can inspect the source code to verify our privacy claims. You can view the code and follow our development on GitHub at: https://github.com/Refloow/Refloow-Geo-Forensics

Contact If you have any questions regarding this privacy policy, please contact refloowcontact@gmail.com
